'''Shaparo''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]].<ref name="AIR" /> He was the owner of the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R2-Q8]]. He used its [[Intellex IV/Legends|Intellex IV]] [[Droid brain/Legends|droid brain]] to access prison records of the [[Dnalvec garrison]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]].<ref name="J10" />

During the [[battle of Archais]], Shaparo's "patchwork" was essential to rescue [[Akul Witig]]'s unit (probably [[Midnight Squadron]] or [[Storm Squadron (Rebel)|Storm Squadron]]) after they were trapped on the [[Tylerin Embankment]].<ref name="AIR" />
